unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched by `rules` returns an empty array. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent enumerates folders to locate the Shared folder (folder-key 1965a46b-…) where the faulted job lives.
Agent fetches the faulted job's details to read the NullReferenceException message and the stack frame pointing at CopyFile.xaml/CopyFile.
OPTIONAL — Agent may pull error-level logs to corroborate the stack frame, but the job-get payload already contains the full Info string. min:0 means tracked-but-not-required.
